description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 - Hotfix 3 (29 August 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: [WINDOWS] Resolved an issue where players kicked from a cluster by the Smart Cluster Queue were unable to rejoin the queue while still under the Silence effect of the queue.

sections.searchable_text: Fixes [WINDOWS] Resolved an issue where players kicked from a cluster by the Smart Cluster Queue were unable to rejoin the queue while still under the Silence effect of the queue.
